questionHtml:
The colours of the indicator in the jars ranged from yellow to purple after five hours.

Predict the distribution of indicator colours in jars 1 to 9.
markschemeHtml:
the jars closer to the light had more purple colours
OR
the jar the furthest from the light was yellow
OR
purple to yellow

Allow for answers indicating colours for each jar within this range.

meta.title: The colours of the indicator in the jars ranged from yellow to purple after five hours. Predict the distribution of indicator colours in jars 1 to 9.
breadcrumbLabels: C1.3.7. Techniques for varying concentrations of carbon dioxide, light intensity or temperature experimentally to investigate the effects of limiting factors on the rate of photosynthesis
